rules.line: -a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S adjtimex -S settimeofday -S clock_settime -k time-change
rules.note: rare time syscalls OR'd (auditctl(8) -S, f3 2.3); LOW tier (f3 3.5)

rules.line: -a always,exit -F arch=b32 -S adjtimex -S settimeofday -S clock_settime -k time-change
rules.note: 32-bit arch pairing (NOT a duplicate; f3 catalog #30 arch-paired intent)

dominant_tier: LOW (rare time syscalls + localtime watch). All additive, all LOW.
rate_band_basis: f3 3.5/6: adjtimex/settimeofday/clock_settime are rarely-called syscalls -> LOW band (1-100/day). localtime watch LOW-traffic. Mixed bytes (1200 syscall / 900 watch).
